DISCOVERY 610, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS MOOT. THE PREVIOUS ORDER OF DECEMBER 13, 2004 STAYING THE DEPOSITION IS LIFTED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO SCHEDULING THE DEPOSITION OF DEFENDANT JEAN DUPURRET AT A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME. THE DEPOSITION IS TO BE COMPLETED BY FEBRUARY 28, 2005. ALL REQUESTS FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
